rulings.Case Title: GOLDEN PROPERTIES, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED VS. JAMES S HAGLER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 5, 2015 line 5. DEFENDANTS JAMES HAGLER, KRISTEN RAMUSSEN and ELISSA FOUNTAIN's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint DENIED. Notice of Intent includes sufficient information re: "rent applicable to each residential unit;" Plaintiff complied with Govt. Code 7060.4(b)(5); advice regarding re-rental rights was sufficient. The factual dispute regarding payment and refund of rent for December 31, 2014 cannot be properly resolved by this motion. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 5, 2015 line 6. DEFENDANT MIGUEL BATAC's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons DENIED, Miguel Batac shall file a response in 5 days of notice of entry of order. = (501/RBU)
